economic_notes: Investments in three energy projects: Giiwedin Noodin FN Energy Corporation, 2401077 Ontario Inc., and 2479793 Ontario Inc. (wind energy partnerships). Adelaide wind project and Romney wind project generating revenue. Chippewa Industrial Developments Limited is a wholly owned subsidiary accounted for on modified equity basis. Ontario First Nations Limited Partnership investment maintained.
notes: Consolidated statements include Chippewa Industrial Developments Limited as a fully consolidated subsidiary (1 subsidiary). Three energy project GBEs accounted for on modified equity basis: Giiwedin Noodin FN Energy Corporation, 2401077 Ontario Inc., and 2479793 Ontario Inc. Net earnings from investment in energy projects of $7,723,621 is a significant non-operating item boosting annual surplus. ISC funding calculated as Grant + Fixed contribution + Set contribution ($119,104 + $5,285,399 + $295,297). Total government transfers include ISC, Health Canada, CMHC, Other federal, Province of Ontario, SFNS, UOI, Stepping Stones, Kinomaadswin, and SOAHAC. Salaries and wages $7,791,790 plus employee benefits $1,620,109 = $9,411,899 total. Distribution to members of $7,784,961 is notably large. Tangible capital assets net book value taken from Note 10: $26,141,315 (2024). Restricted cash includes CMHC $1,246,577 and Romney Project $1,832,923. Budget figures were not prepared on PSAS basis and are not fully comparable. No schedule of remuneration provided in the extracted text.
